creator: korsani@free.fr
text:
Hi,
I just compile mariadb 10.6.17.
It fails to launch, with this message:

[ERROR] Incompatible OpenSSL version. Cannot continue...

I compiled with libressl 3.8.3


options        :
        COLUMNSTORE    : off
        CONNECT_EXTRA  : off
        DOCS           : off
        GSSAPI_BASE    : off
        GSSAPI_HEIMDAL : off
        GSSAPI_MIT     : off
        GSSAPI_NONE    : on
        INNOBASE       : on
        LZ4            : off
        LZO            : off
        MROONGA        : off
        MSGPACK        : off
        OQGRAPH        : off
        ROCKSDB        : off
        S3             : off
        SNAPPY         : off
        SPHINX         : off
        SPIDER         : off
        WSREP          : off
        ZMQ            : off

Downgrading to 10.6.16 works fine
